_templateName: Summarize YouTube videos and generate thumbnails using AI Agent and deAPI
_templateDescription:
Who is this for?

YouTube creators who want to speed up their post-production workflow
Content repurposers who turn videos into written summaries
Social media managers handling multiple YouTube channels
Anyone who needs quick, AI-generated thumbnails from video content

What problem does this solve?

Watching a full video to write a summary and then designing a matching thumbnail is tedious. This workflow does both automatically — transcribe, summarize, and generate a professional 1280x720 thumbnail — all from a single YouTube URL.

What this workflow does

Takes a YouTube video URL as input
Transcribes the full video using deAPI (Whisper Large V3)
AI Agent analyzes the transcript, writes a concise summary, and uses the deAPI Prompt Booster tool to craft an optimized thumbnail image prompt
Generates a 1280x720 landscape thumbnail using deAPI
Uploads the thumbnail to Google Drive

Setup

Requirements

n8n instance** (self-hosted or n8n Cloud)
deAPI account for video transcription, prompt boosting, and image generation
Anthropic account for the AI Agent
Google Drive API access for file uploads

Installing the deAPI Node

n8n Cloud: Go to **Settings → Community Nodes and toggle the "Verified Community Nodes" option
Self-hosted: Go to **Settings → Community Nodes and install n8n-nodes-deapi

Configuration

Add your deAPI credentials (API key + webhook secret)
Add your Anthropic credentials (API key)
Add your Google Drive credentials (OAuth2)
Set the target Google Drive folder ID in the Google Drive Upload node
Ensure your n8n instance is on HTTPS

How to customize this workflow

Change the AI model**: Swap Anthropic for OpenAI, Google Gemini, or any other LLM provider
Adjust the prompt style**: Modify the AI Agent system message to target different thumbnail aesthetics (minimalist, bold text overlay, cinematic, etc.)
Change the output destination**: Replace Google Drive with Dropbox, S3, Notion, or email delivery
Add a summary output**: Insert a Google Docs or Notion node after the AI Agent to save the written summary alongside the thumbnail
Process in bulk**: Replace the Manual Trigger with a Google Sheets trigger containing a list of YouTube URLs
Swap the trigger**: Use a Form Trigger to let team members submit YouTube URLs through a web form
Other video platforms**: The transcription node also supports Twitch VODs, X (Twitter), and Kick URLs
name: YouTube Video Summarizer & Thumbnail Generator

parameters.content:
## Try It Out!
### Automatically summarize any YouTube video and generate a custom thumbnail using AI.

This workflow transcribes a YouTube video, uses AI to create a summary and an optimized thumbnail prompt, generates a professional thumbnail image, and uploads everything to Google Drive.

### How it works
1. **Manual Trigger** starts the workflow
2. **Set YouTube URL** defines the video to process
3. **deAPI Transcribe** extracts the full transcript using Whisper
4. **AI Agent** summarizes the transcript and uses the deAPI Prompt Booster tool to craft an optimized thumbnail prompt
5. **deAPI Generate Image** creates a professional YouTube thumbnail in landscape (1280x720)
6. **Google Drive** uploads the thumbnail image

### Requirements
- [deAPI](https://deapi.ai) account for transcription and image generation
- Anthropic account for AI Agent
- Google Drive API access for file uploads
- n8n instance must be on **HTTPS**

### Need Help?
Join the [n8n Discord](https://discord.gg/n8n) or ask in the [Forum](https://community.n8n.io/)!

Happy Automating!

## 1. Manual Trigger
Click **Test workflow** to start.

You can swap this for a **Form Trigger** to let users submit YouTube URLs through a web form.

## 2. Set YouTube URL
Replace the placeholder URL with any YouTube video link.

Supported platforms:
- YouTube
- Twitch VODs
- X (Twitter)
- Kick

## 3. Transcribe Video
[deAPI Documentation](https://docs.deapi.ai)

Uses **Whisper Large V3** to transcribe the video with timestamps.

The transcript is passed to the AI Agent for summarization.

## 4. AI-Powered Summary & Prompt
[Read more about AI Agents](https://docs.n8n.io/integrations/builtin/cluster-nodes/root-nodes/n8n-nodes-langchain.agent)

The AI Agent analyzes the transcript and:
- Writes a concise summary with key points
- Crafts a thumbnail prompt using the **deAPI Image Prompt Booster** tool

The **Structured Output Parser** ensures consistent JSON output.

## 5. Generate Thumbnail
[deAPI Documentation](https://docs.deapi.ai)

Generates a **1280x720** landscape image — the standard YouTube thumbnail size.

Uses the AI-boosted prompt for best results.

## 6. Upload to Google Drive
[Read more about Google Drive node](https://docs.n8n.io/integrations/builtin/app-nodes/n8n-nodes-base.googledrive)

Uploads the generated thumbnail image to your Google Drive.

You can also extend this to save the summary to a Google Doc or send it via Slack/email.

parameters.text:
=Here is the transcript of a YouTube video. Please summarize it and create a thumbnail prompt.

{{ $json.data.transcription }}

options.systemMessage:
You are a YouTube content expert. You will receive a video transcript.

Your tasks:
1. Write a concise summary of the video with 3-5 key bullet points.
2. Create a compelling YouTube thumbnail image prompt that visually captures the video's main theme. Think bold, eye-catching, and clickable.
3. Use the imagePromptBooster tool to enhance your thumbnail prompt.

Return the summary and the boosted thumbnail prompt in the required JSON format.
